hooks.command: $raw = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); $j = $raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $f = $j.tool_input.file_path; if ($f -match 'build\.gradle$|AndroidManifest\.xml$|AppPreference\.kt$|Constants\.kt$|version\.properties$') { Write-Output '{"systemMessage":"CLAUDE.md may need updating \u2014 check if this change affects architecture, preferences, constants, build config, or the release checklist."}' }
